items.title: In Minor Keys, Khaled Sabsabi, Louvre Heist Film
items.summary: Also, why did a New York gallerist use AI on an Ansel Adams photo?

items.title: The Art Market Post-Pollock
items.summary: After spring's marquee auctions, we are led to believe that everything in our important art universe is doing just fine. It isn't.

items.title: Nicola Florimbi’s Paintings Are Unsettling and Necessary
items.summary: Her depictions of individuals in settings that seem both out of time and of this moment represent one of many engaging paradoxes.

items.title: Patagonia Sues Drag Queen "Pattie Gonia" for Trademark Infringement
items.summary: “This is how corporations bully individuals who cannot match their resources,” said the artist and activist.
